title: Front Office Manager - Beyond Wildlife India Asia Pacific Associates - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Beyond Wildlife India Asia Pacific Associates - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Beyond Wildlife India Asia Pacific Associates is actively seeking a talented and motivated Front Office Manager to join our dynamic team in Pimpri-Chinchwad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Beyond Wildlife India Asia Pacific Associates:
Beyond Wildlife India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in GDS Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Beyond Wildlife India Asia Pacific Associates!
